title: Virtualization Windows
text:
Service and ingress:

```yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  annotations:
    ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-secret: virtvnc-login
    ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-type: basic
    ingress.kubernetes.io/config-backend: |
      http-request del-header Authorization    
  name: virtvnc
spec:
  ingressClassName: haproxy
  rules:
  - host: <some_name>.nrp-nautilus.io
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          service:
            name: virtvnc
            port:
              number: 8001
        path: /
        pathType: ImplementationSpecific
  tls:
  - hosts:
    - <some_name>.nrp-nautilus.io
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  labels:
    app: virtvnc
  name: virtvnc
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 8001
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: 8001
  selector:
    app: virtvnc
  type: ClusterIP
```

Secret to hold the password for your virtvnc:

```bash
kubectl create secret generic virtvnc-login -n <namespace> --from-literal=auth=<my_login>::<my_password>
```
